zizlfz Notes

    Last updated at March 26, 2026
    examplegetting-started

    Welcome to Your Notes

    This is an example note to demonstrate how yournotes will look.

    Features

    Here's what you can do with your notes:

    • Bold text appears inaccent red
    • Italic text appears inaccent blue
    • Code has a subtle background
    • Links are warm and inviting

    Code Blocks

    function greet(name) {
  return `Hello, ${name}!`;
}

console.log(greet('World'));

    Blockquotes

    This is a blockquote. It's styled with a warm yellow accent border and subtle background.

    Lists

    1. First item
    2. Second item
    3. Third item
    • Bullet point one
    • Bullet point two
    • Bullet point three

    That's the basics! Start writing your own notes in the notes/ directory.
